error_pattern: skechers-au outlier: 0 skips, 5% pass — SPA/styled-components selector issue. Other sites: 50-60% of tests that ran.
notes: skechers-au is a major outlier — 0 tests skipped vs 14-15 for others, and only 1/20 passes. skechers is a SPA with hash CSS classes; wishlist selectors likely don't account for this. Other 7 sites show consistent 50-60% for tests that ran. High skip rate (64%) means most wishlist flows require auth/data setup not available in staging.
